_comment: Naisargika Shubha/Ashubha (natural benefic/malefic) classification, consumed by naturalDignityRuleEvaluator.js. Moon is intentionally NOT listed here — its natural nature is dynamic (waxing = benefic, waning = mildly malefic per Paksha) and is computed from the Sun-Moon angular distance inside the evaluator rather than statically configured.
note: Mercury is classically neutral (takes on the nature of whatever it associates with) but is conventionally treated as benefic by default when unafflicted, as in this foundation phase.
